results.content: # Langfuse. ### Langfuse General Information. The company's platform unifies the monetization stack by providing a single integrated engine and uses it to understand what happens in production and use insights to improve their applications, helping companies to track and analyze quality, cost, and latency across product releases and use cases. results.title: How did we get here?
results.content: With an initial product and customers, we got accepted into YC W23 in November 2022. While our customers were excited about Finto (the billing product), we realized that we were not excited about building the *nth* generation of product in an established (small) market. We built an initial version and had our first customers in the YC batch. We decided that we wanted Langfuse to be open source (more on this here) and published the repo. It quickly became clear that Langfuse *works*, our customers loved the initial product, and we were excited to build it. Over the New Year, we decided to branch out into Prompt Management as (1) many early customers asked for it, and (2) we saw a lot of benefit in a prompt management product that is tightly integrated with the tracing/observability features. In our first Launch Week, we reintroduced Langfuse as the AI Engineering Platform and launched essential features to cover the workflow:.

results.title: Simplifying Langfuse for Scale - Langfuse
results.content: A deep dive into how we moved Langfuse to an observations-first data model. In December 2024, we released Langfuse V3 where we moved all tracing data from Postgres to ClickHouse. Today, we are sharing a major next step in product performance and making the product simpler: our shift to an observations-centric data model. Use filters and saved views to focus on exactly what matters — whether that's tracing a single request end-to-end or spotting patterns across your entire project, like which model calls are driving up cost or where latency spikes. We are still working on the upgrade path for self-hosters and will eventually release it as a v4 major version. With this change, we are moving to an observation-centric data model based on a new, wide, and (mostly) immutable ClickHouse table. We were working against our own data model: large users could view only a few days of data in their dashboards, listing recent traces took seconds, and some users saw high latencies and error rates on our public APIs.

Langfuse is an **open source LLM engineering** platform. * LLM Application Observability: Instrument your app and start ingesting traces to Langfuse, thereby tracking LLM calls and other relevant logic in your app such as retrieval, embedding, or agent actions. * Evaluations are key to the LLM application development workflow, and Langfuse adapts to your needs. * LLM Playground is a tool for testing and iterating on your prompts and model configurations, shortening the feedback loop and accelerating development. * Local (docker compose): Run Langfuse on your own machine in 5 minutes using Docker Compose. # Get a copy of the latest Langfuse repository # cd # Run the langfuse docker compose #. | Mastra | JS/TS | Open source framework for building AI agents and multi-agent systems.

results.title: Langfuse for Research & Education - Langfuse
results.content: # Langfuse for Research & Education. Langfuse delivers end‑to‑end observability and evaluation for language‑model systems, in **open-source** and with **generous academic benefits**. > **TLDR;** Langfuse has a generous free offering to get you started. Beyond this, the US $200 monthly fast grant covers the entire Core Plan base fee plus additional usage. **How to start:** Sign up to Langfuse Cloud or deploy via Docker/Kubernetes. **How to start:** Email research@langfuse.com with your academic address. 1. You are enrolled, employed, or formally affiliated with an accredited academic or research institution **or** your work is intended for peer‑review publication. * **Cloud**: Create a workspace on Langfuse Cloud and stay on the Free tier. ### Self‑serve Academic Credit (Langfuse Fast Grant). 1. Sign up to Langfuse Cloud with your academic address. 1. Send an email with your project/proposal to research@langfuse.com. Share your published paper or pre‑print with **research@langfuse.com or tag @langfuse in your social posts**; we are happy to amplify it. Sign up to Langfuse Cloud or self‑host today.
